title: anthoxanthum longifolium
intro: Anthoxanthum longifolium, also known as sweet grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural anti-spasmodic. The health benefits of sweet grass include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, sweet grass is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
